programme.desc: A young woman sues for damages after a catfight at a party. Another woman claims chest contusions from breaking up the fight and sues the man she alleges beat her up.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.247
programme.desc: Alleged abuse of a seven-year-old boy, unpaid loans, and shared living expenses are disputed by ex-lovers. A loan to buy work clothes, a broken lease, and unpaid child support come into play when former lovers fight over money.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.146
programme.desc: A man denies popping the tires and smashing the truck windows of his ex-girlfriend’s new boyfriend’s vehicle in a jealous rampage. Ex-lovers accuse each other of having drug problems during a fight over an alleged loan for a motorcycle.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.24
programme.desc: Babysitter accused of falsely claiming ex-employer smoked marijuana in front of child/Gallery owner denies scamming customer, claims heirloom sapphire sold for alleged ten dollars.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.202
programme.desc: Lesbian ex-lovers accuse each other of paint-ball vandalism and car damage after a bitter break-up over alleged loans for clothes and a stereo.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.142
programme.desc: Man sues mother of his child for selling his Baby Pac-Man game; she counters for harassment, alleging cheating. Man claims ex's obsession forced him to move; she sues for unpaid rent, electric bill.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.111
programme.desc: A woman admits to wielding a knife but not to scratching her ex- stepbrother’s car/A woman demands compensation after a young house sitter allegedly damages her home and belongings when she broke the rules and brought her cat along.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.159
programme.desc: Woman regrets co-signing loan with boyfriend. 11-year-old on dirt bike crashes into moving car; driver claims bike appeared suddenly.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Mr. Wonderful" by one of his victims, Matt Mathews was everything to the women who lost both their hearts and bank accounts to the prolific con artist. Married at least 11 times, Mathews is believed to have scammed hundreds of people.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Spokane
programme.desc: A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Law and Mrs. Shelton
programme.desc: A report on Catherine Mehaffey Shelton, a criminal defense attorney from Dallas. She has been practicing law in Texas for nearly three decades and making headlines for nearly as long, primarily because strange things happen to the men in her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Mary Hill was driving three teens, when her BMW crashed and killed two of them. Hill claims she lost control as the car sped up on its own, but investigators say she was driving recklessly. Hill was charged with vehicular homicide and manslaughter.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Speed
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Pendulum
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Western
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Imitation
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Pilot
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Old Man Out pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF team goes in as a circus team to rescue Anton Cardinal Vossek, who is being held in the impregnable Seravno Prison.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro
programme.desc: Two fierce opponents best Ton and Allen at the auction, leaving the duo in the lurch with a "trash unit" and little chance of breaking even for the day. And Ton gets tazed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NEW The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific serial killers in Alaska’s history. For over a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he stalked them like prey.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. A series of incoming text messages reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: A Winter’s Grave
programme.desc: During an icy Wisconsin winter, a single mom vanishes. Police learn she was recently stalked by two men at a bar, but the danger doesn’t stop there.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Cold Heart

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Albuquerque
programme.desc: When a physician and his wife go missing, conspiracy theories spread. Investigators dig into the case and unearth the story of a bizarre murder.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana field, Brian Davis's body is found at what seems to be an attempted robbery scene. However, a timely afternoon rainstorm uncovers an elaborate plot.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A powerful thunderstorm hits a small Illinois town overnight as a wealthy couple is shot dead in their sleep. Detectives face challenges from the weather while searching for clues, but the storm may provide unexpected leads to catch the killer.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Christopher Green's body is found in a snowy ditch less than a mile from his home, investigators' only hopes of solving his murder are shoeprints at the scene and information from neighbours.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On a blustery Michigan day, police receive a report of a beloved couple found dead in their home. Despite few clues, snow on the ground provides a crucial lead.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: During a bitter, lengthy Michigan winter, a young father vanishes. As spring arrives, a gruesome discovery is made. The harsh winter conditions may aid investigators in their quest for the truth.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Sarah Payne
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Sarah Payne's disappearance and murder shocked the nation. Here, Sarah's mum reveals her tireless campaign to protect other children from paedophilia.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993, gay men in London were being terrorised by a brutal killer. Colin Ireland, a loner from Southend, had made a macabre resolution – to become a serial killer.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Philpotts
programme.desc: When six children died in a house fire in Allenton, Derby in May 2012 it shocked the nation. Parents Mick and Mairead Philpott were charged with the murders. We uncover the reasons behind the arson attack on their own home.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: April Jones
programme.desc: The hunt for five year old April Jones was the largest missing persons search in UK police history when she vanished in October 2012. But on October 6th a local man, Mark Bridger, was charged with her disappearance.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Raoul Moat
programme.desc: The hunt for Raoul Moat was one of the largest in British history, after he wounded his ex-girlfriend, killed her new partner and shot and blinded police constable David Rathband.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Vancouver Island: Rivers of Life
programme.desc: Vancouver island is the largest island off the west coast of North America. Glaciers fuel the flow of some of Canada's tallest waterfalls, and an endless network of rivers and creeks provides the ideal habitat for the pacific salmon.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Caribbean: The Wild Side of Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. From just a few meters wide, to hundreds of kilometers across, each of the over 7,000 islands are different, and each has its own unique wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Malaysia: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Malaysia is one of a handful of countries in the world described as mega-diverse. Malaysia's animals and plants have exploited every opportunity to carve out an existence and so have adapted to some very strange ways of life.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest
programme.desc: The Anavilhanas and Mariua archipelagos are deep in the heart of the Amazon rainforest. Flooded for 6 months of the year, the islands are a fortress of submerged trees. / Vancouver island is the largest island off the west coast of North America.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Blackout Ripper
programme.desc: It was WWII and London was rocked by the Blitz from the planes flying above. But down on the streets below another terrible danger lurked in the shadows. A serial killer was on the loose.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space? The unique environment, the lack of taste in their food and the smell of canned air all contribute to the stresses of living and working in space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: 300 Million Years: Human Earth
programme.desc: Mammals dominate the earth, and humankind changes the face of the planet.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: Shark Paradise of Polynesia
programme.desc: French Polynesia’s great hammerhead sharks are extraordinarily shy animals and still pose many questions, not least where they go during their annual migration.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: The Giants of Rurutu

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: Fragile Mediterranean

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest: The Great White Sharks of Guadalupe

programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: The Wolf Pack is Back

programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel let's loose on an abandoned 70's trike kit and works his magic to turn the naysayers into believers.

programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel takes on a 1923 C-Cab and a client with hoarder tendencies. Pulling out all the stops, Ian attempts to create a vintage style tow truck.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms a mini-kit van into a crazy utility vehicle.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: There is a virus spreading through Lakewood Elementary--it’s new nicknames and it’s changing how everyone treats each other! The playground has been quiet lately--too quiet--and the Tough Customers don't like it one bit.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?

programme.title: Arthur: No Acting Please/Prunella Deegan and the Disappointing Ending
programme.desc: When Fern lands a role in a community production, she fears she's not talented enough to be a star. Finally, the final volume of the Henry Screever series is out. Prunella and Marina compete to see who can finish the book the fastest.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland
programme.desc: Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Art Attack/Tales from the Crib
programme.desc: When Muffy sees a kinetic sculptor’s machines, she brags that she can make even better ones. Then, Vicita is upset at having to trade in her cherished crib for a big-girl bed, so D.W. shares her story of that same rite of passage.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Music Box
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's A Happy Day!
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Chase
programme.desc: Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Tactician
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Linkup
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Detection
programme.desc: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron. On earth, despite Jetfire saying he's one of the good guys, the kids are suspicious of Sideways - as are the Decepticons. And something huge and ominous is approaching earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Awakening
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Desperate
programme.desc: The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together. Sky Blast at first resists, then sings the others to him to save Optimus. They all realise there's more to the minicons than first appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Runaway
programme.desc: Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 2
programme.desc: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Mike & Avi
programme.desc: Saddled with two young kids and tired of living surrounded by a construction zone, Mike and Avi are desperate to move immediately. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Delecia & Dwayne

programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is put out when he loses several games of hide-and-seek. Pingu refuses to help Mother. Pingu asks Father if they can go up the mountain. Pingu goes fishing but promises to be back on time.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend plays with a kite outside the house. Pingu discovers a magnet. Pingu plays with his boat on the water. Pingu plays with his toys when he falls asleep.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to play a thoughtless trick on Grandfather. Pingu and his sister play with their aeroplane. Pingu constantly plays tricks on his sister. Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to bake a cake by himself. The arm falls off Pingu's sister's teddy bear. The Pingu family receives a call from Grandfather asking for their help.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine card. Pingu tries to sleep, but his sister is snoring. Pingu bounces on everything in the igloo. The siblings argue over their toys.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Dipsy hug and run off to watch some children making some fancy dress clothes. A crown appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky wears the crown he becomes King Tinky Winky.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch children making a boat they then put it in a paddling pool to see if it will float. Tinky Winky’s bag falls in a puddle.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some Voice Trumpets rise to say Good Morning to the Teletubbies whilst they are eating Tubby Toast. They run off to see some children getting up in the morning.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children exploring the colour red. Po makes some adjustments on the switch panel and all the lights change to the colour red. Po sees some red clouds and changes the colour of all the flowers to red.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies slide in to Home Hill and run off to see a parade celebrating the Chinese New Year. A little boy shows us the dragons. A tooter appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky blows it very hard it knocks Dipsy's hat off.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: The Legend of the Golden Hammer
programme.desc: Our first sight of Fixham is in the episodic special The Legend Of The Golden Hammer. The Legend of the Golden Hammer consists of six stories in which Bob and his team tackle building jobs at six of Fixham’s key locations.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice eating his barley seed so he asks Bob to build a seed store to keep it safe. Whilst Bob is working, Farmer Pickles decides to go and buy some replacement seed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has promised to put a cat flap in his kitchen door for Pilchard, but he gets an urgent call from Farmer Pickles who needs a fence built to keep the rabbits out of his lettuce field.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is making a through-lounge at the Bentleys’, while Wendy goes to JJ’s yard with Lofty and Dizzy to collect a steel joist and other materials. Lofty is nervous about carrying the joist, but Dizzy and Trix race off with the bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Bentley are moving house, and Bob is carrying out a loft conversion at their new home. Mr Bentley greets Bob and his team, then leaves for work. The removal company call to say that they have several staff off with flu.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr and Mrs Sabatini have asked Bob to convert a local house into a delicatessen. Unfortunately for Roley, there is no rolling to be done. The gang leaves to get on with the job and Roley decides to tag along just in case.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor asks Bob to build a Pets Corner in the local park. Farmer Pickles has picked up a selection of animals for it – including a chinchilla – and sends Travis and Spud off to deliver them to Bob. Unfortunately Bob runs out of chicken wire.

programme.title: Bob's Big Plan
programme.desc: When Bob and the team are building an extension to the offices of Mr Adams the local architect, Bob hears of a competition to build a brand new town in nearby Sunflower Valley, a place Bob knows very well from his childhood. Mr Adams shows Bob his idea.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning in Sunflower Valley and Benny arrives bursting with enthusiasm. He’s not needed in Bobsville today and he’s come to the Valley to help. Today, the team are building Mr and Mrs Bentley’s special new house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing an antique fireplace for Mrs Percival. He goes to JJ’s yard to collect it and finds JJ playing with his new model aeroplane. Bob then heads to Mrs Percival’s and starts to knock out the old fireplace.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a lean-to for Mr Beasley’s allotment. Wendy offers to pick up the materials from JJ’s yard, while Bob makes a start on the cement floor. But before he can leave, Bob gets a call from Mr Dixon, who needs a hole in his roof fixed urgently.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building an extraordinary new cave-house for Sandy Beach – a caveman expert who’s moving to the valley to study how cavemen used to live. The team are all head into the mountains.

programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip, Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw start their shopping in Stafford and finish with a nail-biting auction in Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw gets a peek into the life of the royals and Mark Stacey learns about Pomp and Circumstance on the fourth leg of their road trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two antiques experts Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw play with boats and helicopters as they storm towards the finishing line of this road trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip and antiques experts James Lewis and James Braxton kick off at Ampthill in Bedfordshire and head for Market Harborough with the popular hymn Amazing Grace ringing in their ears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their trip James Braxton and James Lewis travel around Oxfordshire in their classic car in search of bargains to sell at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mick Hughes
programme.desc: Landlord and pub owner Mick Hughes is brutally attacked in his living quarters situated above his bar, he bleeds to death. Discovered by employees 48 hours later, the police start gathering evidence.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Darryl Cozart
programme.desc: Family man Darryl Cozart disappears one night after work. His wife is frantic she knows something is wrong. The police believe it’s a missing persons case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs
programme.desc: A dedicated psychic puts his reputation on the line to track down two con men in Scotland.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jacqueline Poole
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Jacqueline Poole is assaulted and strangled in her home. The police find her body 48 hours later and launch their investigation.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts
programme.desc: The TAPS team is the first paranormal team to ever investigate the famed Friar's Club in New York City. Next, the team travels to the Main Street Armory in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 1
programme.desc: The Most Haunted tackle the deserted sprawling Ashwell Prison in this As-Live uncut episode. Feeling isolated and separated the team find themselves confronted by something in the dark.

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to film at Ashwell Prison after being pushed to the limits tempers fray and Yvette is stuck alone, petrified as she is stalked by an unseen force lost in the corridors of the prison and the team scramble to save her

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 1
programme.desc: Yvette and the MH team travel to the oldest pub in Macclesfield, famous for ghost stories and strange occurrences. Whatever is there makes itself known quickly and violently.

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to investigate Macclesfield’s oldest pub and are soon under fire from poltergeist activity. Glen’s scepticism is put fully to the test.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 1
programme.desc: This old Welsh Castle pushes Yvette’s team of ghost hunters to the limit and at least one of them doesn’t make it to the end…but who? Strange noises and sinister shadows seem to create an atmosphere of foreboding throughout the night.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 2
programme.desc: The team continue their investigation into Ruthin Castle, as the activity gains momentum one of team is hit hard and has to leave, so the others go in search of whatever is there lurking…all is going well until they find it.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Blood Donor, Epitaph, Stiches in Time, Soldier.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wall, The Chalkboard, The Getaway, The Prescription, Summer Camp.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Prophecy, Couch Potato, Love Over the Counter, Imaginary Friend, Last Man on Earth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: One for the Road, The Music Box, Two to One, Damsel, The Horn.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Hand, The Battered Doll, Poker Justice, Above the Clouds, Screen Saver.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Mummy, The Perfect Record, Grave Sitting, Murder on the Second Floor, They Towed My Car.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side
programme.desc: The Wilcott’s 5-year-old son is attacked by an unseen entity. Their only hope is an exorcism.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: When The Lights Go Out
programme.desc: After newlyweds Brooke and Dominic Ardolino experience strange paranormal events in their home, they call in investigators who uncover two spirits – one is trying to warn them while the other is dangerous.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: A ghost prepares a ball for the ghosts in the oldest tower of the king's castle. He decides to invite Molang and Piu Piu to his party because he lacks musicians. However, he forgets that he scares everyone.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu meet a tribe of friends who solve everything with their clubs. Both will have to show the tribe there are other ways to solve their issues.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang, Piu Piu and some friends are working on a building site, but the work is exhausting for small Piu Piu. An engineer offers him robotic armour that gives him the strength to work faster.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: As Molang and Piu Piu are preparing a potion to cure the king's mosquito bites, they discover an adorable plant that's also a carnivore.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: After a coconut fight, Molang and Piu Piu are stranded on two different islands. To be reunited, they will have to reconcile two fighting people and show them what coconuts are really for.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu think they saw a monster in the forest! Frightened at first, then intrigued, they try to find out more about this creature.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In prehistory, after a terrible storm destroyed all their provisions, Molang and Piu Piu invent the first Christmas tree.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In Prehistory, Molang and Piu Piu save a wild horse from a sabretooth tiger and try to tame it.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu are assistants to a druid who makes very smelly potions. Things become complicated when the druid takes part in a competition.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: After Molang and Piu Piu saved the king, he offers them a special gift - armour, a shield and a sword to go and chase off the dragon.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Piu Piu falls into a hole in the Egyptian desert. Molang goes to help him, and they find themselves face to face with a mummy.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu find a sick fairy. They take her to Merlin, who prepares some medication. But one of Piu Piu's feathers falls in the caldron and turns the medicine into a love potion.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: The king is fed up with all his responsibilities and wants to go on holidays. When he throws his crown and it lands on a pig, Molang and Piu Piu come up with an idea.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang drops a soporific flower in the banquet's soup. The whole castle falls asleep, leaving Molang and Piu Piu to enjoy the castle life.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu have been chosen by their tribe to go look for a pyramidion in the jungle. What they don't know is it's well-kept by a serpent.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: When facing a scary dragon, the legendary hero runs away. Molang and Piu Piu catch up to him and help him regain his self-confidence.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: When Molang and Piu Piu go to the conquest of the West, they arrive last, but they know how to remain number one in their friends' hearts.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: When delivering a pizza to the village engineer, Piu Piu is zapped with a laser ray. He finds himself in the huge rag doll the inventor was working on.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: As a reward for their generosity, a magician offers Molang and Piu Piu a magic bean. The bean grows until the sky and they discover a goose that lays chocolate eggs.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu are working in the kitchen until a gust of wind tousles with Piu Piu's hair. He can't help but look at his reflection.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In the Middle-Ages, Molang and Piu Piu meet a triton whose dream is to visit the town. Molang and Piu Piu show him around the city while carrying him in a bathtub.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu land their spaceship on a planet. When they find a peculiar egg and knock on it, a cute little creature comes and they all very quickly become the best of friends.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Some aliens kidnap Piu Piu and close the spaceship's door in Molang's face, but he manages to hang on to the ship. As they arrive on their planet, the aliens offer Piu Piu presents.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu are on their small boat when they see a wrecked ship from afar. The captain swears a monster attacked him and they ponder if the monster might only be defending the sea.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: A cute little creature lands in Molang and Piu Piu's garden. When they decide to take care of it, it starts taking up a lot of space.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu help a musketeer on a dangerous mission. But when he loses his glasses, it's up to Molang and Piu Piu to protect him.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: After longing for the uniforms of the royal guard of Buckingham Palace, Molang and Piu Piu decide to fill out an application.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Merlin helps all those who need assistance with a twist of his magic wand. Molang and Piu Piu help him understand that their friends find satisfaction in doing things by themselves.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In the Middle-Ages, Molang and Piu Piu watch the king run after a small spider. He trips, falls into a magic caldron and turns into a spider.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu board a phantom ship where the captain is struck by a wicked curse. To end this terrible curse, Molang and Piu Piu have to try and teach the captain how to swim.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: In the desert, Molang and Piu Piu find a magic lamp. It may grant wishes, but it also causes damage.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu order a robot that does everything, but don't realise it's doing too much.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Molang and Piu Piu, engineers at the court of Louis XIV, invent an umbrella to protect the king and his wig. Unfortunately, the results are far from satisfying, leading to less-than-satisfactory results.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: During the Olympic Games, Molang and Piu Piu have to bring a javelin to an athlete, but as Molang is playing with it, the javelin falls into a labyrinth, creating problems for everyone involved.

programme.title: Molang
programme.desc: Thanks to Molang who helped and encouraged him, Piu Piu becomes a magistrate. But very busy with his work, Piu Piu forgets Molang. The friends have to recalibrate their relationship.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in – and co-directs – this powerful story of an aging soccer player whose life is crumbling. All he has left is a devoted 12-year old fan – and a desire to live free.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: John Mason is left wounded after his father's murder, and is hellbent on avenging it. A tense love triangle develops between him, his beautiful nurse, and his best friend.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Plague Carrier
programme.desc: Earp and Dr. McCarty urge a doctor to open a practice in Dodge City but when smallpox breaks out they learn he isn't licensed.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Murderer's Return
programme.desc: Convict Dobie Jenner arrives in Tombstone after being released from Yuma prison for murder. When his old mining partner George McKean sees him in town, he tells Earp to run Jenner out of town

programme.title: Death Valley Days: A Friend Indeed
programme.desc: Prospectors venture into Death Valley to find a legendary lost mine.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Bread on the Desert
programme.desc: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Count Me In, Count Me Out
programme.desc: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Prince of the Oyster Pirates
programme.desc: An incident in the life of Jack London is recreated in this drama about the San Francisco waterfront.

programme.title: Meltdown
programme.desc: After failing to save his wife from 'The Doctor', Kit Li begins working as a bodyguard and secret stunt double for the cowardly martial arts film star Frankie Lane.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn’t about to let a witness be murdered on his watch.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Dwayne Johnson stars as an NYPD detective trying to solve the biggest cash heist in U.S. history.

programme.title: The Wrong Girl
programme.desc: Sophia is an ideal 17 year old student, who quickly strikes up a friendship with Grace, the new girl in school. But their friendship takes a sinister turn when Grace begins disrupting the lives of Sophia and her family.

programme.title: Saving Emily
programme.desc: When her daughter is diagnosed with leukemia, a woman (Alexandra Paul) and her new husband get pulled into the whirlwind life of her seedy ex-husband who tries to extort money from them in exchange for his life-saving bone marrow.

programme.title: Murder In The Vineyard
programme.desc: Life is amazing for Emma and her teenage daughter Beatrice when they move from the big city to an idyllic small town, but then Beatrice is hazed at a party one night by mysterious bullies. Emma sets out to find who the culprit is.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: In the near future, Frank Grieves is a new breed of police officer working in a city where all recreational drugs are legal. When he is taken off a case involving an unidentified corpse, he discovers that legalization has come at a price.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: On a faraway planet where blue giants rule, oppressed humanoids rebel against their machine-like leaders.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Grace and Goliath
programme.desc: Hollywood big-shot Josh Jenkins sweeps into Belfast to make a movie, but before long his world crashes and he loses everything. Hotel cleaner Lily invites him to stay with her family and gradually the people of this 'strange' city touch his heart forever.

programme.title: Scales
programme.desc: Mermaids are real! Siren has lived her whole life thinking she's an ordinary girl, but on the eve of her 12th birthday she learns that she is destined to become a mermaid. She must say goodbye to her entire life as she transitions into the water.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within
programme.desc: Devastated by the loss of their mother, three teens discover a mystical realm ruled by unseen forces and must overcome evil in the order to return home.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Wizard
programme.desc: The Wizard devises a scheme to steal all of the national monuments for his own personal exhibit. Meanwhile, Walter concocts an antidote that works on every poison known to man.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Skull
programme.desc: The Skull decides to resurrect all of the world's villains, beginning with a mummy.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Weatherman
programme.desc: The Weatherman causes a national blizzard in the middle of summer and demands that U.S. citizens unanimously elect him president.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Lawrence of Moravia
programme.desc: Frank and Bruce are captured by a sheik who's been stealing plumbing supplies just for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Means to an End
programme.desc: When an important witness turns up dead, Jo is caught up in the dangerous investigation of the suspected rapist who was freed on her watch in D.C.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team suspects that a badly burned corpse may have been a cage fighter.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A role-playing game turns lethal, with one player falling victim to a bona fide killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate two seemingly unrelated deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate the murder of a lab tech that has similarities to a 1950's cold case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac has a choice to make as he lies in limbo between life and death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: All Fall Down
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts the CSIs by leaving them cryptic hints, and the longer it takes them to decode these puzzles, the higher the death toll rises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must look at Miami's elite.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality TV star dies at a premiere, each of her co-stars becomes a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team recreate a crime scene that has been washed away.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A roller derby arena provides the backdrop for a grisly crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A teenage boy shoots up LVPD headquarters and holds Russell hostage.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business
programme.desc: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Det. Luke Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in the torching of a laundromat – and the rookies are forced to confront their own burning issues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Drugstore Cowboy
programme.desc: An addict (Matt Dillon), his wife (Kelly Lynch) and another couple steal the drugs they live for in 1971 Portland, Ore.

programme.title: Killer Joe
programme.desc: A cop (Matthew McConaughey) who moonlights as a hit man agrees to kill the hated mother of a desperate drug dealer (Emile Hirsch) in exchange for a tumble with the young man's virginal sister (Juno Temple).

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: A magic crystal leads a college student (Josh Charles) and an adventurer (Rutger Hauer) on a surreal quest to save the world.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson's hero David Balfour joins rebel Alan Breck Stewart in 18th-century Scotland.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: The Magic Box
programme.desc: Biography of British film pioneer William Friese-Greene, who designed and patented a working cinematic camera at the expense of his domestic life. He was largely ignored by the commercial industry until the publication of a controversial biography.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Two couples, all car enthusiasts, challenge one another to a friendly race on the return from the annual London-to-Brighton veteran car rally. What starts out playfully becomes increasingly serious as they speed to the finish line.

programme.title: Medium: The People In Your Neighborhood
programme.desc: Allison's neighbors are furious when a convicted sex offender moves into the area, but Allison's visions have her questioning his guilt.

programme.title: Medium: Blood On The Tracks
programme.desc: When a man is killed by a train, Allison has a dream forewarning of an identical murder.

programme.title: Medium: Only Half Lucky
programme.desc: Allison becomes concerned when she discovers her brother's newfound success.

programme.title: Medium: Labor Pains
programme.desc: A desperate man pleads with Allison to help him find his missing wife.

programme.title: Medium: Me Without You
programme.desc: Allison and Joe begin new careers that take them in different directions.

programme.title: Medium: And Then
