programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Soldier
programme.desc: An enigmatic photo of her boyfriend’s brother killed in Vietnam entrances Lisa.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: A train accident in rural Nebraska gradually unveils a mystery involving the town's bank clerk. Starring: Cillian Murphy, Ellen Page, Susan Sarandon

programme.title: A Kid in King Arthur's Court
programme.desc: When a violent earthquake rocks Southern California, hapless teenager Calvin Fuller (Thomas Ian Nicholas) finds himself careening through a hole torn in the fabric of time.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: An FBI agent reprises his disguise as an old lady to become a nanny in a crime suspect's house.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A pair of losers marry two elderly sisters, thinking they'll inherit their fortune and Beverly Hills estate.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: Love at First Bite
programme.desc: After being evicted from his castle in Transylvania, Count Dracula and his assistant Renfield travel to New York to find a woman who the Count believes is the reincarnation of the woman he has loved for all eternity.

programme.title: Mother Lode
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of an isolated, crazy miner.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Prince of the Oyster Pirates
programme.desc: An incident in the life of Jack London is recreated in this drama about the San Francisco waterfront.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Lost Sheep in Trinidad
programme.desc: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Let My People Go
programme.desc: The Chumash Natives, enslaved by Spanish soldiers in California, rebel against their captors.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party
programme.desc: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Solid Foundation
programme.desc: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
programme.desc: Lured by promises of gold, prospectors provide a wounded outlaw with aid and an alibi.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson is exploring a deserted mine with his son when they discover a Wells Fargo strongbox.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: One Fast Injun
programme.desc: A likable old miner starts losing friends when his luck takes a turn for the better.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Billy the Kid sets out to avenge the death of friend John Tunstall.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Brute Angel
programme.desc: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: Inferno: Skyscraper Escape
programme.desc: Disaster hits when two teenagers are caught in a fire on the 20th floor of a skyscraper. Their parents are on the 60th. Will they survive the flames?

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Biography of the famed motorcycle daredevil, much of which was filmed in his home town of Butte, Montana. The film depicts Knievel reflecting on major events in his life just before a big jump.

programme.title: Murder In The Vineyard
programme.desc: Life is amazing for Emma and her teenage daughter Beatrice when they move from the big city to an idyllic small town, but then Beatrice is hazed at a party one night by mysterious bullies. Emma sets out to find who the culprit is.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A riveting thriller inspired by the experiences of real-life CIA officer Valerie Plame, whose identity was revealed after her husband questioned the U.S. involvement in Iraq.

programme.title: Evil Doctor
programme.desc: Expectant parents Aubrey and Matt find their lives haunted, and their marriage tested, by an unhinged OB GYN with a mysterious past and who is after their child.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Martian Land
programme.desc: In the future, mankind lives on Mars. When a massive sandstorm breaks through, its inhabitants must stop the storm before it wipes them out next.

programme.title: Meteor Apocalypse
programme.desc: In this End Times thriller, a gigantic meteor enters Earth's orbit and begins to disintegrate, showering the planet in poisonous debris.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within
programme.desc: Devastated by the loss of their mother, three teens discover a mystical realm ruled by unseen forces and must overcome evil in the order to return home.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: The Simple Life of Noah Dearborn
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Sidney Poitier and Dianne Wiest star with Mary-Louise Parker in this enchanting tale about a quiet hero who becomes the talk of the town.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: I Bury The Living
programme.desc: Cemetery director Robert Kraft discovers that by arbitrarily changing the status of plots from empty to occupied on the planogram causes the death of the plots' owners.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac has a choice to make as he lies in limbo between life and death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a firefighter dies, Mac discovers similarities to a string of arson cases.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man opens fire during a political rally, injuring a senatorial candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate the body of a woman dressed in a ballgown found in a lake.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Bodies discovered relate to a psychopath re-enacting the game of Clue in real life.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The owner of a popular bar is killed and robbed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A teenage boy shoots up LVPD headquarters and holds Russell hostage.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs race to discover who shot Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the brutal murder of a therapist's daughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team are called to a fashion boutique when a young girl is killed in an explosion.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A baby is snatched from her mother's arms by a professional kidnapper.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston is shocked when his former student is found murdered and becomes the focus of a CSI investigation into the world of Mexican wrestling.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick's case of a deceased skydiver takes an interesting turn when Catherine discovers there may be a connection between the skydiver and a mysterious double murder case.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy run into each other at a science fiction convention for one of their favorite classic television shows, they end up investigating the murder of one of their beloved actors.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine revisits one of the very first cases she worked as a CSI when the convicted felon in the murder claims the verdict was based on faulty evidence.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An unexplained illness that is affecting random citizens of Las Vegas baffles the CSIs.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge
programme.desc: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA whose judgment is clouded by matters of the heart and is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: A magic crystal leads a college student (Josh Charles) and an adventurer (Rutger Hauer) on a surreal quest to save the world.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides (Kyle MacLachlan) leads the fight for vital spice on a desert planet in the year 10191.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: The Magic Box
programme.desc: Biography of British film pioneer William Friese-Greene, who designed and patented a working cinematic camera at the expense of his domestic life. He was largely ignored by the commercial industry until the publication of a controversial biography.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Two couples, all car enthusiasts, challenge one another to a friendly race on the return from the annual London-to-Brighton veteran car rally. What starts out playfully becomes increasingly serious as they speed to the finish line.

programme.title: Rockets Galore
programme.desc: Residents of a small island in the Atlantic resist their government's plan to make their home a missile base.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons
programme.desc: Children's adventure set in the 1920s about four children on holiday in the Lake District, who meet two tomboys. The children name themselves The Swallows while their two friends become The Amazons, and together they embark on a series of adventures.

programme.title: Medium: And Then
programme.desc: Now that Allison's special abilities have been revealed to the public, everyone's lives have been turned upside down.

programme.title: Medium: But For The Grace of God
programme.desc: Allison tries to help investigator Cynthia Keener find a missing teenage girl. Meanwhile, Ariel dreams of Allison's high school days from the '80s.

programme.title: Medium: To Have And To Hold
programme.desc: Joe brings a reluctant Allison with him to a party at a prospective employer's house. Later on, the employer's daughter disappears, leading Allison to connect her recent dreams about Paris to the disappearance.

programme.title: Medium: Do You Hear What I Hear
programme.desc: A young deaf girl is kidnapped, causing Allison to completely lose her hearing. With Allison at a loss, Joe decides to help her and Cynthia Keener investigate the kidnapping.

programme.title: Medium: Girls Ain't Nothing But Trouble
programme.desc: Larry Watt, a defense attorney who has caused trouble in Allison's past, asks Allison to be a consultant for him. Low on money, Allison accepts his offer.

programme.title: Medium: Aftertaste
programme.desc: Devalos tries to reclaim the D.A.'s office. Allison's support of Devalos is tested when she has visions of Devalos' strongest political supporter involved in a horrible conspiracy.

programme.title: JAG: Desert Son
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG: Brig Break
programme.desc: A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings
programme.desc: In south Texas, residents have reported strange phenomena, stories of supernatural events have abounded, and a 10-year-old girl has disappeared.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU is called to a bank where an employee, whose wife is being held for ransom, hacks into the system to steal money to pay off her captors, but things take a turn when he realizes his own brother may be involved.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU is called to a local school when a student who has been pushed to his limits by bullies decides to seek justice and brings a gun into the school, and Sgt. Parker must figure out a way to talk the troubled teen down.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a woman dying of a brain disease goes on a crime spree with her fiancé, the SRU team is called in to track them down at a ballroom, where they are sharing their last dance together

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU team is deployed to a hospital to end a stand-off between gang members and a man trying to protect his wounded brother.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A wave of terrorist bombs shuts down the city, pushing Team One to the limit and putting one of their own on the line.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Saskatchewan farmer Percy Schmeiser’s battle against Monsanto after their GMOs interfere with his crops. Starring Christopher Walken.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere’s innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: My Brother the Pig
programme.desc: Being a teen is tough enough for Kathy Cauldwell without having to be the target of her little brother George's jokes. Then their parents leave for France and George is magically transformed into a pig via some of their nanny Matilda's ancient rocks.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Gone Fishin' / A Little Body of Work
programme.desc: Young Randy is reluctant to accompany his Uncle Ned on a fishing trip. / Delinquents Eddie and Herman have a bad habit of stealing parts for their hot rod from cars on the street.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Self-centered and conceited Prince Charming has only two goals in life: to look maahvelous, daaahling, and to reach the castle of Sleeping Beauty in order to kiss her out of her spell.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Works In Wax
programme.desc: Craig and William are just about the only two people left who care about Rottmucker's Wax Museum and its collection of classic monsters.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Cave Man
programme.desc: Young Peter's birthday is coming up, and he's looking forward to spending the weekend with his overworked father, a scientist at the local museum.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Hyde and Go Shriek
programme.desc: Wendell the nerd never wanted any trouble. In fact, he did everything he could to fit in and earn the respect of tough jock Rex Reavis and his friends, including dismissing all their cruel practical jokes with a shrug and a laugh.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Fare Tonight
programme.desc: Best friends Camille and Mildred are obsessed with monsters and vampires.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Gorilla's Paw
programme.desc: Lowly Walter would like nothing more than to join Ken "kingpin" Seldon's secret club.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: This Wraps it Up
programme.desc: Naomi is extremely self-conscious about her height. That, plus the fact that she's the only girl on her class field trip to the Egyptian Pyramids.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Grounds for Horror
programme.desc: Petey and the rest of the guys are looking forward to a week of summer R and R at Camp Rockbotom - until flat-topped Counsellor Bill call them to attention and informs them that there will be no time for fun.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Radical surf dudes Mike and Ben decide to take Ben's father's most bodacious speedboat for a spin - without permission.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Game Over
programme.desc: When Buddy and Vince skip school one too many times to play their favourite video arcade game "Monster Attack", they find themselves magically transformed into a real life version of the game.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Down on the Farm
programme.desc: Scott and his family volunteer on a farm for a week, but it proves to be a lot more work than they've expected. The animals sense that the Howards are werewolves and flee, leaving the Howards responsible for finding them before the farmer's return.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Diary of a Mad Werewolf
programme.desc: The town statue is stolen by a couple of crooks who ask for ransom money. The Howards learn that the inside of the statue contains the diary of their distant werewolf relative, and grow concerned that the diary could get into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Teen Wolf, Come Home
programme.desc: In an adjacent town, Scott picks up a flamingo sink for his dad's customer. While leaving the shop, he falls down a man hole and loses his memory. Scott explores all over the town in order to remember his identity, and his family goes searching for him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Scott and the Howlers
programme.desc: After Scott and his rock band perform a song on a televised talent show, Scott is discovered by a record label that wants to sign him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Howlin' Cousins
programme.desc: Scott visits his cousin, Todd, but the two have nothing in common. As Scott tries to help Todd come out of his shell, he realizes that he and his cousin are much more alike than he initially thought.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Wizard
programme.desc: The Wizard devises a scheme to steal all of the national monuments for his own personal exhibit. Meanwhile, Walter concocts an antidote that works on every poison known to man.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Skull
programme.desc: The Skull decides to resurrect all of the world's villains, beginning with a mummy.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A bank robber murders his wife and frames Tobeel for the crime.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After a young gunfighter brazenly kills an over-matched rancher, the rancher's brother wants Matt to settle the score.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Townspeople protect an outlaw they believe has reformed.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The shooting of several members of an outlaw gang, though in self defense, triggers an emotional crisis in Matt, haunted by memories of all the men he has killed.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A woman comes a long way from the east to Dodge, only to realize that her fiancé has lost all his money and does not wish to marry her.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A dance-hall girl manipulates her admirers into facing each other in gunfights.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A former gunslinger's past catches up to him.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An official from Washington sets out to tame Dodge City.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kitty gets annoyed by a pair of old farmers who are each trying to have a fling with her.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The murder of a printer and the discovery of a forged municipal bond send McGarrett to a documents expert for help in investigating a destructive ring of forgeries of government securities.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Lew Ayres guest stars as Dr. Elias Haig, a nuclear physicist caught up in a brazen extortion scheme. The conspirators demand $100,000,000 cash from the government in exchange for their assurance not to blow up a portion of Honolulu with an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Comedian Jack Carter makes a rare television dramatic appearance when he guest stars as gambler Harry Foxton, the central figure in a macabre $240,000 lottery based on the projected hour of his death.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Victor Buono guest stars as Eric Damien, an international thief, who enlists a carnival sleight-of-hand artist to steal a nickel valued by coin experts at $100,000.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A daring bank robbery carried out under the cover of a mock military emergency sends McGarrett and his Five-O detectives to the windward side of Oahu.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Using their unorthodox methods, the Coltons combine their individual talents to create a team of world-class bounty hunters in this MacGyver spinoff.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Rowdy Yates is accused of shooting a man in the back and faces death when he tries to carry out the dying man's last request.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: An Army corporal finds himself in charge of a squad of men of which he is the weakest member.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A cantankerous old drover directs his fear of being old and uneducated into grudge fight with Gil Favor.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A small town U. S. marshal, bitter because he has no opportunity to make a name for himself, finally gets a chance to become famous.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s office crush Paul returns to work, and she is determined to find out how he feels about her once and for all.Stuart, sick of doing all the cleaning himself hires a maid, who quickly turns Haskell’s life upside down.

programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank's tourism idea backfires. Dog River's popularity soars. Wanda gets a news gig.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar dislikes the lack of local content, sparking a competition for a new cable show.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen joins a spin class after Hank's comments. Brent avoids the new phone while Oscar overuses it.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey, Brent and Hank's golf game turns competitive. Oscar and Emma's new bed is problematic.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank's prank creates an unintended crop circle. Oscar's house painting drives him and Emma crazy.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Wanda's crush's phone number depends on Hank washing his truck. Brent questions his sense of smell.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Dog River searches for a gift for their Japanese sister city. Brent and Lacey go green.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar's strict rules as a substitute bus driver cause chaos. Hank advertises for the Ruby.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent meets an unknown relative. Wanda shows off her math skills with Karen's help.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Stop In The Name Of Fun

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: When an old friend of Michael is seriously injured in a hit-and-run accident, he sets out to find the person responsible.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches, Bonnie (Patricia McPherson) witnesses a murder but has difficulty proving it when no one can find the dead body. With David Hasselhoff, John Calvin.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and K.I.T.T. meet their match in a seemingly indestructible adversary -- K.A.R.R. -- K.I.T.T.'s alter ego.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and K.I.T.T. go western when they descend upon Sage City to help Rebecca Hammond stop the cattle rustling on her ranch.

programme.title: Mr. D: 24 Hour Famine

programme.title: Mr. D: Grade The Teacher

programme.title: Mr. D: Exam Week

programme.title: The Lost World: Mark of the Beast

programme.title: The Lost World: Survivors

programme.title: The Lost World: The Pirate's Curse

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 101

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 179

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 183

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 220

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Terror By Night

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Pennsylvannia Gun
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to Sussex to investigate the murder of Squire Douglas, who was shot to death in a sealed-up castle, with only two apparent suspects.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: While on holiday, the detectives are impersonated for a profit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants compete in a bison-dish challenge that tests their archery and cooking skills. Plus, it's cowboy steak night with special guests news commentator Stacey Dash and Olympic gold medallist Phil Dalhausser.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the service challenge, VIP guests rapper Flo Rida and comic Jeff Dunham join the local chefs and their families. An angry Ramsay has to merge the teams to finish the service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams can only have one chef in the kitchen at a time as they prepare three entrees, each with a different protein.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs must identify ice cream flavours in a blind taste test challenge; actress Meredith Baxter and Olympic swimmer Haley Anderson attend the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining six chefs receive visits from their families, but we find out what will happen when they are roped in to help with the day's challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's chef challenge continues. After a shaky dinner service, a furious Gordon is forced to take over from the team. See who will take the fall as the final draws nearer.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Back in the Hood
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Road
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived. The only question is, whom?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: True Identity
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Match Point
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known addresses."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Menehune Mischief
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits - Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers - the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mister Mom
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait & Snitch

programme.title: Run's House: Chicks Fly the Coop
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: Run's House: Go for the Gold

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Parent Trap Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee musters up the courage to finally introduce her new boyfriend, the older Morris, to her parents. Though Charles and Big Dee Dee publicly approve, privately they try to get Dee Dee to break it off.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Home Is Where The Car Is Episode
programme.desc: When Mona discovers that her new boyfriend is living in his car, she sets out to prove that she's not so shallow that it makes a difference. Meanwhile, Phyllis puts her war with Big Dee Dee on hold to help her weather a health scare.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big All Bets Are Off Episode
programme.desc: Mona, Dee Dee, Phyllis and Big Dee Dee have trouble getting along when they all play poker together at Mona's apartment. When Dee Dee loses to Mona she has a hard time accepting that she may not be the best at something.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Credit Check Episode
programme.desc: Mona gets upset when her boss, Kai, seems to take all the credit for the Delicious Records talent search. However Kai explains that she will have to take the fall if the promotion fails, so she has to take control.
